notes: Fired from https://app.textql.com/org-selection after the user clicks an org tile.
Sets an httpOnly session cookie scoped to the chosen org. The session is single-org: to change orgs later, call ExchangeSession (for an existing session) rather than redoing this flow.
Response body not captured — webapp ignores it and immediately navigates to /chat/new, relying on the new cookie for subsequent Connect-RPC calls.
The intermediaryToken is single-use-per-org: posting it twice with different organizationIds is probably allowed (not verified), but after success it is treated as spent by the webapp.
